title: Smoky Fluffy Malaysian Pork Curry
description: A comforting, umami-rich pork curry with a gentle smoky flavor and fluffy texture, sweetened with coco sugar and crafted to be glutenfree.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and grated ginger; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the cumin, coriander, turmeric, and smoked paprika, stirring to toast the spices for 2 minutes.
Add the pork cubes, coating them in the spice mixture; brown on all sides for 5 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Stir in the coco sugar and fish sauce, adjusting the seasoning with a pinch of salt if needed.
Simmer uncovered for 20–25 minutes, or until the pork is tender and the sauce has thickened slightly.
Taste and adjust sweetness or saltiness if desired.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and lime wedges, with steamed rice or gluten‑free flatbread if desired.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
